entries.title: ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Implementation agents must write gate report artifacts, not just self-assess
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
